title: Essential EXTRA
description: Essentially ModPack for playing with your friend!
body:
###   **The assembly itself has mods that will make your game more comfortable for you!**
![Essential EXTRA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LDpjT0nQ/images/8436e461ccef1758b9d7e6622e54a8c71e104693.png)
> **This modpack maximizes the optimization of Minecraft 1.20.4 and adds the ability to play with friends through Essential Mod.**

![120FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c8cea10e4f8cdee942878f9c6f90364c7cbbef4.png)
> Do you have any questions or suggestions?
Please join the disagreement server here:[https://discord.gg/G8N8b77Svx](https://discord.gg/G8N8b77Svx)
